member.name: F:GTA.VehicleLockStatus.DriversSeatOnlyNoJacking

summary.para:
s can only get in on the driver's seat normally only when the
does not have a driver. Warping into the
is the only way to make
s get in on any other seat.

s cannot get any other
s out of the
to kill them.

member.remarks:
Changing the
's lock status to this value does not immediately block
s' entering vehicle tasks.
